content.text:
All 14 active tests pass (including the new high-enchantment test). The previous count was 13, now 14.

Verification of test expectations:
- Sword base 100 × 1.3 (high-enchantment) = 130 + 5 fee = 135 ✓
- Cursed sword test (155): 100 × 1.5 × 1 (enchantment 0) = 150 + 5 = 155 ✓
- Plain sword test (105): 100 × 1 × 1 = 100 + 5 = 105 ✓

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `highEnchantmentModifier` to the existing `ITEM_MODIFIERS` list. It returns 1.3 when `item.enchantment >= 5`, otherwise 1.
- Result: All 14 active tests pass (38 todo)
- Approach: Followed the existing `curseModifier` pattern - minimal addition to the modifier composition chain. No restructuring needed because the existing reduce-based composition already supports stacking modifiers.

File modified: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_13-03-01_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts
